_doc: Event sink: discrete mineflayer events worth subscribing to. Each entry defines the event, a filter to ignore irrelevant firings, and the observation template. Kept minimal — only events that polling cannot catch.

subscriptions.filter: oldBlock && newBlock && oldBlock.name !== 'air' && newBlock.name === 'air' && oldBlock.position && oldBlock.position.distanceTo(bot.entity.position) < radius
subscriptions.note: Fires for ALL block breaks including instant breaks (fast tools, creative). Uses blockUpdate solid→air transition. Cannot attribute to a specific player — only that it happened near Marvin.
Chat works regardless of distance. May want to exclude bot commands to avoid narrating skill interactions.

subscriptions.extract: { name: entity.username ?? entity.name ?? entity.mobType, type: entity.type }
subscriptions.note: Covers players and mobs. Marvin witnessing death is thematically on-brand.
Cooldown per-player prevents spam. Only tracking players — mob damage is too noisy.
Can't tell WHO opened it, just that it happened.
Very selective — only explosions and thunder.
